Failing_Condition: The Ghost Version Leak (v23.11 resurfacing from legacy loops).
Applied_Fix: Decommissioned legacy loops and ensured strict version tagging in Director routing.

Failing_Condition: Thesis Decay Exits firing prematurely on Swing holds due to un-smoothed signals.
Applied_Fix: Implemented signal smoothing and disabled premature firing on Swing duration holds.

Failing_Condition: RANGE Regime TP/SL inversion (placing limits inside the broker spread).
Applied_Fix: Enforced Absolute Minimum Distance limits to prevent TP/SL being placed within or too close to the spread.

Failing_Condition: Synthetic/Validation data leaking into the live vantage_execute.py routing layer.
Applied_Fix: Hardcoded isolation of synthetic testing channels and directories from live vantage_execute execution vectors.

Failing_Condition: Uninitialized Oracles (e.g., DDQN) contributing default P=0.5 scores to the MoE consensus. (UnboundLocalError: cannot access local variable 'ddqn_p')
Applied_Fix: Explicitly initialize DDQN bounds early and raise graceful degradation errors on uninitialized oracle scores.

Failing_Condition: Stop-Loss mismatch (Dollar-bar ATR vs D1 Time-bar ATR).
Applied_Fix: Standardized ATR extraction to strictly fetch and apply D1 Time-bar ATR for Stop-Loss Floors.

Failing_Condition: Float truncation/rounding in logging layers feeding back into active scaling math.
Applied_Fix: Decoupled visual logging representations from internal float calculations to preserve precision.
Added GATE-0 same_direction_cluster logic to limit same-direction positions strictly to 1 per cluster.

Failing_Condition: MT5 Error 10016 (TRADE_RETCODE_INVALID_STOPS) due to microscopic stop distances.
Applied_Fix: Enforced 3.5x D1 ATR absolute Stop-Loss Distance Floor before execution.

Failing_Condition: Binance Error -4130 / MT5 10017 Open Stop or Take Profit with closePosition existing.
Applied_Fix: Replaced closePosition=True conditional parameters with reduceOnly=True for bracket orders.
